debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
w : ℕ
args : Vector (ZMod p) w
cs : Clap.Cs p (ZMod p)
i : ℕ
h : i < w
h' : ¬args[i] = 0
h'' : ¬args[i] = 1
⊢ Clap.Cs.eval p inst✝ (Clap.assert_bits_e p inst✝ (ZMod p) w args cs) = denotation.n

failed_attempts:
<;> cases i <;> simp_all [Vector.getElem_cons, Vector.getElem_nil]
  <;> try
    {
      have : args.head * (1 - args.head) ≠ 0 := by
        intro H
        have : args.head = 0 ∨ args.head = 1 := by
          apply or_iff_not_imp_left.mpr
          intro h0
          apply mul_left_cancel₀ (sub_ne_zero_of_ne h0)
          simpa [h0] using H
        cases this <;> contradiction
      simp [this]
    }

| zero => contradiction
  | succ w IH =>
    cases i
    · simp [assert_bit_e]
      have : args.head * (1 - args.head) ≠ 0 := by
        intro H
        have : args.head = 0 ∨ args.head = 1 := by
          apply or_iff_not_imp_left.mpr
          intro h0
          apply mul_left_cancel₀ (sub_ne_zero_of_ne h0)
          simpa [h0] using H
        cases this <;> contradiction
      simp [Cs.eval, Exp.eval, this]
    · simp [assert_bit_e]
      specialize IH (args.tail) cs i.succ (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h) h' h''
      simp [Cs.eval] at IH ⊢
      exact IH

induction w with
  | zero => contradiction
  | succ w ih =>
    intro cs
    cases i
    · simp [assert_bit_e]
      have : args.head ≠ 0 ∧ args.head ≠ 1 := ⟨h', h''⟩
      have : args.head * (1 - args.head) ≠ 0 := by
        intro H
        have : args.head = 0 ∨ args.head = 1 := by
          apply or_iff_not_imp_left.mpr
          intro h0
          apply mul_left_cancel₀ (sub_ne_zero_of_ne h0)
          simpa [h0] using H
        cases this <;> contradiction
      simp [Cs.eval, Exp.eval, this]
    · specialize ih (args.tail) (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h) h' h''
      simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval]
      split_ifs with H
      · exact ih cs
      · simp

induction w with
  | zero => contradiction
  | succ w ih =>
    intro cs
    cases i
    · simp [assert_bit_e]
      have : args.head ≠ 0 ∧ args.head ≠ 1 := ⟨h', h''⟩
      have : args.head * (1 - args.head) ≠ 0 := by
        intro hh
        have : args.head = 0 ∨ args.head = 1 := by
          apply or_iff_not_imp_left.mpr
          intro hh'
          apply mul_left_cancel₀ (sub_ne_zero_of_ne hh') hh
        tauto
      simp [Cs.eval, this]
    · specialize ih (args.tail) (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h) h' h''
      simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval]
      split_ifs with hh
      · exact ih _
      · simp

induction w with
  | zero => contradiction
  | succ w ih =>
    intro cs
    cases i
    · simp [assert_bit_e]
      have : args.head ≠ 0 ∧ args.head ≠ 1 := ⟨h', h''⟩
      have : args.head * (1 - args.head) ≠ 0 := by
        intro hh
        have : args.head = 0 ∨ args.head = 1 := by
          apply or_iff_not_imp_left.mpr
          intro hh'
          apply mul_left_cancel₀ (sub_ne_zero_of_ne hh') hh
        tauto
      simp [Cs.eval, Exp.eval, this]
    · simp [assert_bit_e]
      specialize ih (fun j hj => h (Nat.succ j) (Nat.succ_lt_succ hj)) h' h''
      rw [ih]

<;> cases i <;> simp_all [Vector.getElem_cons, Vector.getElem_nil]
  <;> try { exfalso; exact h' rfl }
  <;> try { exfalso; exact h'' rfl }
  <;> apply denotation.eq_n_of_ne_zero
  <;> simp_all [Exp.eval, ZMod.val_zero, ZMod.val_one, Nat.succ_pos]
  <;> omega
